name: Ryan Caudill
headline: Software Engineer focused on AI systems and cloud reliability
valueProp: I build reliable, AI-enabled software systems that reduce operational friction for real teams.
about: I specialize in practical AI and backend systems where correctness and usability both matter. My work focuses on turning noisy workflows into dependable software by combining data pipelines, interfaces, and operational constraints.

experienceHighlights.title: Incoming Oracle OCI
experienceHighlights.summary: Joining Oracle Cloud Infrastructure to build systems where reliability, scale, and performance are non-negotiable requirements.

experienceHighlights.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
experienceHighlights.details: University of South Carolina | Oct 2025 - Present
experienceHighlights.summary: Built synchronized capture and UI tooling for a four-camera and IMU data collection workflow to reduce timing drift and operator error.

experienceHighlights.title: Software Engineering Teaching Assistant
experienceHighlights.details: University of South Carolina | Jan 2024 - Present
experienceHighlights.summary: Coached 32 teams through architecture tradeoffs, sprint execution, and maintainability practices in recurring code reviews.

experienceHighlights.title: Software Engineer Intern
experienceHighlights.details: South Carolina Department of Transportation | May 2025 - Aug 2025
experienceHighlights.summary: Automated OSHA reporting from SQL Server to ITA API and built tooling that reduced manual data-entry bottlenecks for non-technical staff.
experienceHighlights.logoAlt: South Carolina Department of Transportation logo

technicalFocus.title: Reliability-Critical Systems
technicalFocus.summary: I prioritize deterministic behavior, observability, and failure-mode handling in systems that cannot silently degrade.

technicalFocus.title: Applied AI Workflows
technicalFocus.summary: I use ML and LLM tooling when they remove operational friction, not as feature theater.

technicalFocus.title: Product-Oriented Delivery
technicalFocus.summary: I focus on interfaces and workflows that real teams can adopt quickly and trust in daily use.
